verses.text: Na lungkham hun ding a hong tun' ma, “Nuntak nuamsa kei ing,” na cih ma hun, na khangno lai-in nang hong Piangsakpa phawk in
Lungkham hun i cih in: Nang-a' dingin nitaang, khataang, aksi taangte a dialh hun, meiipi kai a then' nawnloh hun
na muan' na suan' a thahat na khut, na baan, na khete, a thanem hun, an haina dingin na hatang tawmlua ta-in na mit maangin, limtakin khua na muh theih nawnloh hun
khuasung gamlumnate na bil in za thei nawnloin, ansukna gingte na zak theih phat nawnloh hun, la kisate za thei nawnloin vasa ham nangawn in hong phawn'zawh nawnloh hun

keen sangte-ah pai ngam nawnloin, lam pai ding a haksat hun, na samte hong kang-in, na khangno thahatna beita-in na tha a kiam hun ding ahi hi. Eite in a tawntung inn ding a zuan ding ihi a, khuasung lampi-ah kahna awging kiza ding hi
I ngun meivak khaina a khau kitatin, i kham meivak kia-in kitam ding a, i tuikhaina khau kitatin, i tuikhaina beel kitam ding hi
I pumpi, lei suakkik ding a, i nuntakna a hong pia Pasian' kiangah i kha ciahkik ta ding hi
Thugen Siampa in, “A kiman'na a omlo, a mawknapi, na khempeuh a mawknapi ahi hi,” a ci hi.
Thugen Siampa, mipil ahih banah, amah in ama theihteng mite tungah a hilh hi. Amah in paunakte limtakin sin a, a man ahihna thu hoihtakin entel hi
Thugen Siampa in a zaknophuai kammal khawm a, ama gelh kammalte a man taktak ahi hi
Mipilte' thugente pen tuucingte in tuu hawlna-in a zat ciangkhut hiam tawh kibang hi. Tua thute pen eite khempeuh tuucin' bangin a hong Cing Pasian' piak ahi hi
Ka ta aw, na phawk ding thudang khat omlai hi. Lai gelh-in a bu-a bawlna in bei hun nei theilo a, lai tam sin luatna in pumpi gimsak hi
Hih thute khempeuh banah gen ding thu khat bek om hi. Mihing hong kipian'sakna a thu bulpi pen in: Pasian zahtakna leh a thupiakte man'na ahi hi
A pha hita leh a sia hita leh a simthamin i hih simte nangawn i hihna khempeuhah Pasian in thu hong khen ding hi.
